subject: Re: Fwd: ELECTION
body:
still kicking,, marcia,, I don't actually do email,, don't feel unloved ,, I only do it for the case,, and I hate it.. remenber , every e mail is looked at by the gov't. excep t priviledged ones.


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, January 11, 2008 5:08:12 PM
Subject: Fwd: ELECTION


 
 
Marcia M.






Start the year off right. Easy ways to stay in shape in the new year. 


-----Inline Message Follows-----


are you alive and well ? Seem so out of touch
 
Marcia M.






Start the year off right. Easy ways to stay in shape in the new year. 
are you alive and well ? Seem so out of touch
 
Marcia M.






Start the year off right. Easy ways to stay in shape in the new year.
